rule_metadata.name: auditd
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'auditd' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule auditd
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'auditd' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "auditd"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "auditctl -e 0"
		$string2 = "auditctl -e0"
		$string3 = "systemctl disable auditd"

	condition:
		any of them
}
